title: json_skip_string no surrogate validation — inconsistent with parse path
description: json_skip_string (used when skipping non-extracted fields) does not validate surrogate pairs. json_parse_string (used on the extracted field) does. Trigger: {"bad":"\uD800","password":"hunter2"} — extract_field("password") succeeds on JSON with a lone high surrogate in an unrelated field. The scanner either validates all strings or none. Inconsistency creates undefined expectations about what constitutes valid input.
